<!-- Scope check first: this project will not accept features aimed at evading
detection or removing fingerprints from audio — that is the harm the tool
exists to counter (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Requests in that direction will be
declined. -->

**What should it do**

**Why (concrete use case)**

**For new measurements/features**: what physical property does it measure, and
why does it carry provenance or quality signal? (New features need a rationale
documentable in `docs/METHODOLOGY.md`.)
